name: retailer-activator
description: Offline license activator for ElHegazi Retailer

scripts.build: node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync(process.execPath,'activator.exe');require('fs').writeFileSync('sea-config.json',JSON.stringify({main:'activator.js',output:'sea-prep.blob',disableExperimentalSEAWarning:true}))" && node --experimental-sea-config sea-config.json && npx postject activator.exe NODE_SEA_BLOB sea-prep.blob --sentinel-fuse NODE_SEA_FUSE_fce680ab2cc467b6e072b8b5df1996b2 && del sea-config.json sea-prep.blob
